title: Ashgad (disambiguation)
content:
'''Ashgad''' could refer to:

==Canon==
*The '''[[Ashgad Prize]]''', an academic award
*'''[[Seti Ashgad]]''', the [[senator]] for [[Fresia]]

==Legends==
*'''[[Seti Ashgad/Legends|Seti Ashgad]]''', [[Senator/Legends|senator]] and [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] [[Engineer/Legends|engineer]]

{{Disambig}}
